we have to dance
Reach for the stars

Svetom vlada ƒНudna epidemija
ƒМekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda pi≈°e LOCK DOWN,
Vidi≈° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ƒНini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ƒНekamo
Da me grli≈° hoƒЗu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva

≈†ta ƒЗe dalje biti ba≈° me zanima

Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Jo≈° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reƒН
PuniƒНemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeƒН.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ƒРole ƒРogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ≈°to smo sami,
Ne mo≈Њemo vani
Zato doƒСi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok ima≈° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aran≈Њman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicвАЛвАЛ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Kido

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ from Golubinja near ≈љepƒНe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вАУ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вАУ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвАЛ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вАЛ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вАЛ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вАЭ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вАЩs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвАЩve never seen them before.  ItвАЩs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвАЩs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вАЬKingвАЭ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вАЬAvengersвАЭ films, вАЬHotel RwandaвАЭ), Khris Davis (вАЬJudas and the Black Messiah,вАЭ TVвАЩs вАЬAtlantaвАЭ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвАЩs вАЬThe Walking Dead,вАЭ вАЬStar Trek: DiscoveryвАЭ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), Eric Bauza (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), and Zendaya (upcoming вАЬDune,вАЭ вАЬMalcolm & MarieвАЭ).

Lee (вАЬGirls Trip,вАЭ вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвАЩs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вАЬSpider-Man: HomecomingвАЭ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вАЬWonder ParkвАЭ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вАЬThe MuleвАЭ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвАЩs вАЬWhen They See UsвАЭ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вАЬEternalsвАЭ), editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars Episode VIII вАУ The Last JediвАЭ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вАЬRampage,вАЭ вАЬWar for the Planet of the ApesвАЭ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вАЬGreenbook,вАЭ NetflixвАЩs вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вАЭ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.
